subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden, O My handmaiden! The tongue of My mercy calleth thee from the direction of My prison, and the kingdom of Mine utterance addresseth thee from the seat of My throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امتی امتی ینادیک لسان رحمتی من شطر سجنی و یخاطبک ملکوت بیانی من مقر عرشی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @consolation and comfort
